MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued To May-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lauren Schlenoff Kowal, Esq., from Coblentz, Patch, Duffy & Bass LLP, 415-391-4800, for Plaintiff and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF 360 SPEAR LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint is Granted. While defendant's arguments are normally better addressed through a demurrer or motion to strike, for the convenience of the parties and to avoid further pleading challenges raising the same arguments, the court has reviewed those arguments, and now rejects them. The new fraudulent conveyance claim is not barred, as a pleading matter, by the exculpatory clause, nor is the new claim premature. The new allegations regarding the failure to obtain the required insurance are not, as a pleading matter, defeated by the declaration of Mr. Shanagher. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
